narrative:
Heath 1-B (precinct in Licking County) has 949 registered voters, with 61.6% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 21.9% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 16.4%, a modest Republican lean of 5.5 percentage points.
